prompt: Ultra-minimal typographic logo on pure black background. The text 'MM AGENCY.' in a single line, all uppercase. The 'MM' portion is rendered in bold heavy weight white, and the 'AGENCY' portion is rendered in a lighter weight white, creating a clear visual hierarchy through weight contrast alone. The period/dot at the end is in electric cyan (#00E3FF). The typeface is geometric sans-serif with perfectly uniform stroke widths, similar to Futura or Avant Garde — clean, mathematical, no decorative elements. Wide letter-spacing throughout. No icon, no symbol, no graphic element — pure typography only. The logo sits perfectly centered on the black canvas. Professional brand identity, vector sharp, razor clean edges. Flat design, no shadows, no gradients, no 3D effects.
negative_prompt: icon, symbol, graphic element, shield, mask, illustration, 3D, gradient, shadow, glow, neon, complex, busy, decorative, ornamental, serif font, script font, handwritten, rough texture, grunge, noise, blur, low quality, pixelated, realistic photo, photography, human, colorful rainbow, multiple colors
